content: We can integrate the 2025 configurable ICM curiosity mechanism into the ACP harness agent runtime execution model to enable swarm UAV agents to spontaneously generate intrinsic exploration rewards during runtime session spawning, without relying on pre-configured external target signals. This gives the ACP runtime harness dynamic self-guidance for unknown environment exploration that existing static target assignment frameworks cannot provide.
source_topics: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
